title: security-adversarial review (design gate)
manager: Before M2's spec hardens, a security-lensed pass attacks the trust stack's known soft spots — it has had logic review but never a hostile one, and a trust system nobody has tried to break is a trust system that will break in production against someone who did try. The findings amend the receipts design. This is the external-specialist gate the blind-thinkthrough process requires for security-critical work.
cs: agenda on record: transparency-log split-view/equivocation (witness cosigning or gossip; offline inclusion proofs alone can't detect forks), OIDC-provider compromise as keyless root, single-receipt revocation, presentation replay; satisfies the PROCESS external-specialist gate.
